title: polygala × hybrida
intro: Polygala × hybrida, also known as the common or hybrid milkwort, is a perennial plant that belongs to the milkwort family (Polygalaceae). It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Polygala × hybrida include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, promote relaxation, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often consumed in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
